title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and Go library for pulling, running, and chatting with GGUF models locally via a REST-style API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API with sync/async clients and streaming support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; offers callbacks and async iterators for chat/generate.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: LlamaIndex Ollama integration
summary: Lightweight wrapper to use any local Ollama model as the LLM backend in LlamaIndex RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI (React + FastAPI) that talks to a local Ollama instance; supports multi-user, docs, and plugins.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community npm package that exposes a friendly command-line wrapper around the Ollama REST API for quick prompts and file ingestion.

title: ollama-copilot (vscode)
summary: VS Code extension that adds a Copilot-like sidebar powered by any Ollama model you have pulled locally.

title: chat-ollama (yarn package)
summary: Minimal chat UI written in Next.js that streams responses from Ollama; useful as a starter template.

title: Ollama4j – Java client
summary: Java/Kotlin library providing typed models and synchronous/asynchronous calls to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed generate/chat methods with Tokio-based async and streaming support.

title: OllamaSharp – C# SDK
summary: .NET library that exposes Ollama endpoints through an HttpClient wrapper; includes chat and embedding methods.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community so you can use Ollama models as generators or rankers in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes showing how to combine Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, GPU stacks, and edge devices.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-affinity and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support for easy local or cloud runs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts on selected notes and insert responses back into your vault.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query any local model and stream the reply into a thread.

title: Ollama discussion: “New tool use support”
summary: Active GitHub discussion tracking experimental tool-calling / function-calling features being added to Ollama.

title: reddit/r/ollama – Weekly model sharing thread
summary: Reddit megathread where users post custom Modelfiles, quantization tips, and GGUF creations for niche use-cases.
